hypothesis: Accepted-stack bad trades may contain a narrow entry short-term extension failure family where trades entered after an already extended short-term move and then mean-reverted, distinct from hold-quality, wide-stop, low-MFE, overnight gap, near-target giveback, sector breakdown, and add-on adverse audits.
single_causal_variable: entry short-term extension failure taxonomy v2 unique closeout
locked_variables: entry short-term extension failure taxonomy v2 unique closeout
acceptance_rule: observed_only; must produce machine-readable entry-extension bad-trade classification, good-trade collateral risk estimate, and next testable alpha candidate
